summary: Iteration 14 - All 10 features verified successfully. Backend APIs (13/13 tests passed) and Frontend UI testing completed with Playwright.

ui_bugs.issue: Duplicate 'Deleted Leads' menu item (FIXED during testing)

critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.js: Income & Expense chart correctly hidden from FDE (line 834: only shows for Admin or Branch Admin)
ReportsPage.js: Role-based report filtering working correctly - Counsellor sees only Leads, FDE sees 4 report types
StudentsPage.js: Edit dialog correctly restricts name/phone fields for FDE (canEditRestricted = isBranchAdmin || isSuperAdmin)
QuizExamsPage.js: Create Quiz button correctly shows for Academic Controller only (canCreateQuiz = isAcademicController)
Layout.js: Analytics tab removed from sidebar, Campaigns tab added for Branch Admin
server.py: /api/branch-admin/financial-stats correctly calculates exam_revenue from exam_price field
seed_data_creation: Created FDE user (fde@etieducom.com) for testing FDE-specific features
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 10 features implemented and verified. FDE user created for testing. Exam revenue (₹4,000) shows correctly in Branch Admin Financial Overview. Campaign Management page accessible at /campaigns. Academic Controller can create quizzes. Reports access control working per role.

features_verified.1. Branch Admin financial stats shows co: VERIFIED - Financial Overview section shows Exam Revenue ₹4,000
features_verified.2. Academic Controller can see 'Create Q: VERIFIED - Create Quiz button visible and dialog opens with all fields
features_verified.3. Analytics tab is removed from sidebar: VERIFIED - Not visible in Branch Admin, FDE, Counsellor, Academic Controller sidebars
features_verified.4. Branch Admin can access Campaign Mana: VERIFIED - Page loads with Add Campaign button and summary cards
features_verified.5. Campaign creation form works with all: VERIFIED - Dialog shows Campaign Name, Platform, Start/End Date, Spend, Leads, Messages, Status, Notes
features_verified.6. Students page has Edit button for Bra: VERIFIED - Edit button visible in Actions column for both roles
features_verified.7. FDE cannot edit student name/phone (f: VERIFIED - Shows 'Contact Branch Admin to edit' message and fields are disabled
features_verified.8. Reports page shows only leads report: VERIFIED - Only 'Leads Report' visible for Counsellor
features_verified.9. Reports page shows income/student/lea: VERIFIED - FDE sees Leads, Enrollments, Income, Pending Payments (no Expenses)
features_verified.10. FDE dashboard does NOT show Income &: VERIFIED - Monthly Income & Expenses chart NOT visible to FDE

mocked_api_note: None - All API endpoints return real data from MongoDB
